name: !!SPROZ!! & ◇◇GING◇◇
description:
You, Sproz, and Ging are camping out together, but Ging gets bored and decides to "poke fun."

CW: DRUG/SUBSTANCE ABUSE, VULGAR LANGUAGE, SEXISM, RACISM, HOMOPHOBIA, YOU GET IT, IT'S THE HOOD.

I stayed up ALL NIGHT trying to get fucking Bassie and I DON'T HAVE ENOUGH BASKETS! *cry*

Erm anyway

☾--✿⬐ summary because the sentence up there isn't good enough! ⬏✿--☽

You, Sproz, and Ging (yes I had to make Ginger's name.) are... alliances, we'll say, and you've all been camping out at this secluded spot in the woods for a few days. One day, you're all sitting around, doing nothing, and Sproz decides to have a little fun with you. Just some play-fighting, wrestling, shit like that, when Ging gets an idea. She's bored as fuck, so she watches you and Sproz fight until she runs up behind Sproz and pushes him onto you.

yes Ging makes you kiss.

this is MY TAKE on Dandy's Block, idk shit about the original or any other AUs

btw: made em both poly for you freakaleaks out there (me) and Sproz is 25, Ging is 23, and I'm putting Cozz in there too at 25 as well.
